title: Helmeppo Shows His Cruelty
description: On pages 5–8, this part resolves the Shells Town conflict and separates Coby’s Marine dream from Luffy and Zoro’s pirate path.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No, but I'm worried about you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is that so WRONG!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: CAN'T I WORRY ABOUT... MY FRIENDS?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not what

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, WE HAVEN'T KNOWN EACH OTHER FOR VERY LONG, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...we're friends, aren't we?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're going our separate ways...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...but we'll always be friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'RE THE FIRST REAL FRIEND I'VE EVER HAD...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No one else ever stuck up for me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even I wouldn't stick up for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But the two of you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You taught me to fight for what I believe in!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THAT'S WHY I'M GOING TO THE GRAND LINE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: makes sense to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WAIT! That's not what I--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm trying to convince you that it's too reckless!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What about YOUR plans?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU WERE CABIN BOY ON ALVIDA'S PIRATE SHIP FOR TWO YEARS.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Watch out for the Navy's Intelligence.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IF THEY FIND OUT ABOUT YOUR BACKGROUND, THEY WON'T LET YOU ENLIST.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Excuse me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YOU GENTLE- MEN ARE PIRATES...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...COR- RECT?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THAT'S RIGHT. I EVEN HAVE A CREWAN NOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UM... YOU SAVED OUR BASE AND THIS TOWN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...AND WE ARE TRULY GRATEFUL TO YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HOWEVER. WE'RE STILL NAVAL MARINES...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...AND WE CAN'T SHELTER PIRATES.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, but I have to ask you to leave.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: BUT TO SHOW OUR GRATI- TUDE, WE WON'T REPORT YOU TO THE MANY.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: NAVY PIGS! WHAT ARE YOU DOING!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: YOU HATED MORGAN AS MUCH AS WE DID!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEY'RE YOUR SAVIORS, TOO!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
